infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Dr. Dose sends reminders when your scheduled medication doses are due, including when the app is closed or your phone is locked.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Dr. Dose uses your photo library so you can choose a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Dr. Dose uses the camera so you can take a profile picture.

plugins.photosPermission: Dr. Dose uses your photo library so you can choose a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Dr. Dose uses the camera so you can take a profile picture.
